questionHtml: Suggest one limitation of this recording method in determining the accurate mean number of individual bats flying.
markschemeHtml:
a. same bat may be recorded more than once 

b. some bats may not fly over [the recording station]
OR
only bats flying over the station are recorded 

c. two bats flying close/together might be recorded as one

meta.title: Suggest one limitation of this recording method in determining the accurate mean number of individual bats flying.
